mapper.select: SELECT movie_id AS movieId, score, algorithm_type AS algorithmType FROM stats_user_recs WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT search_user_cnt AS searchUserCnt, search_cnt AS searchCnt, search_with_result_cnt AS searchWithResultCnt, search_zero_result_cnt AS searchZeroResultCnt, after_search_view_user_cnt AS afterSearchViewUserCnt, after_search_rating_user_cnt AS afterSearchRatingUserCnt, after_search_favorite_user_cnt AS afterSearchFavoriteUserCnt, after_search_watched_user_cnt AS afterSearchWatchedUserCnt, search_to_view_rate AS searchToViewRate, view_to_watched_rate AS viewToWatchedRate, search_to_rating_rate AS searchToRatingRate, TO_CHAR(calc_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS calcDate FROM stats_search_funnel_1d WHERE calc_date = (SELECT MAX(calc_date) FROM stats_search_funnel_1d) LIMIT 1

SELECT search_keyword AS searchKeyword, rank_no AS rankNo, search_cnt AS searchCnt, search_user_cnt AS searchUserCnt, zero_result_cnt AS zeroResultCnt, zero_result_rate AS zeroResultRate, avg_result_count AS avgResultCount, after_search_view_user_cnt AS afterSearchViewUserCnt, after_search_watch_user_cnt AS afterSearchWatchUserCnt, after_search_rating_user_cnt AS afterSearchRatingUserCnt, search_to_view_rate AS searchToViewRate, view_to_watch_rate AS viewToWatchRate, problem_score AS problemScore FROM stats_search_keyword_insights_1d WHERE calc_date = (SELECT MAX(calc_date) FROM stats_search_keyword_insights_1d) ORDER BY rank_no ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT total_active_users AS totalActiveUsers, view_users AS viewUsers, rating_users AS ratingUsers, comment_users AS commentUsers, favorite_users AS favoriteUsers, favorite_folder_action_users AS favoriteFolderActionUsers, watched_users AS watchedUsers, view_to_rating_rate AS viewToRatingRate, rating_to_comment_rate AS ratingToCommentRate, comment_to_favorite_rate AS commentToFavoriteRate, favorite_to_watched_rate AS favoriteToWatchedRate, TO_CHAR(calc_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS calcDate FROM stats_user_funnel_1d WHERE calc_date = (SELECT MAX(calc_date) FROM stats_user_funnel_1d) LIMIT 1

SELECT cohort_dt AS cohortDt, retention_day AS retentionDay, cohort_users AS cohortUsers, retained_users AS retainedUsers, retention_rate AS retentionRate FROM stats_user_retention WHERE calc_date = (SELECT MAX(calc_date) FROM stats_user_retention) ORDER BY cohort_dt DESC, retention_day ASC LIMIT #{limit}
